author: isaaclyman
description: Display a word count, page count, creation date, or other statistics for each file, folder and vault in the File Explorer pane.

manifest.author: Isaac Lyman
manifest.description: Displays a word count (and more!) for each file, folder and vault in the File Explorer pane.
manifest.name: Novel word count

name: Novel word count

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - On the new mobile UI, place the vault count underneath the file/folder count in the left split. Fixes #131, #132.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix an issue causing folder and note titles to right-align when they begin with text in an RTL language, such as Arabic. (Fixes #121)

Thanks to @Natifishman for the fix.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add a slider to set the opacity of count labels in the File Explorer.

Fixes #117.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add a "Line Break Count" option, which counts the number of lines (as in lines of Markdown code, not equivalent to the way you'd count lines on the page of a book).

Fixes #114.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Allowlist LaTeX files (`.tex`) for counting. Counts may not be accurate.

Fixes #113.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Make the plugin update `data.json` less frequently to avoid excessive noise in sync tools like Obsidian Sync. The plugin now only updates data.json at the following times:
  - When the plugin loads.
  - When the plugin unloads.
  - When settings are changed.
  - When a file is created, deleted, or renamed.
  - Once every five minutes while files are being modified.

Fixes #110.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Update the name of the "Reanalyze" command in the command palette to indicate that it will also reset the session. (Fixes #105)
- Add a new advanced setting to allow the user to set their preferred date format as a MomentJS format string. See [the MomentJS documentation](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/). (Fixes #100)

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add new count type "Track Session," which allows you to track your progress since the last time Obsidian started, the plugin initialized, the settings changed, or you clicked Reanalyze.
- Fix scoping of CSS classes, which were bleeding over into other panes that happened to have a file tree.

Fixes #96, #102.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Remove leftover logging statement.

Fixes #98.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Allow count types to be set for the project root only, separate from folders and files.

Affects #96. Fixes #26.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Fix a bug that shows "undefined" in the file tree when using the Frontmatter Key data type with advanced formatting.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add new "Frontmatter Key" data type to the available counts. This lets you specify a key in your Properties to display verbatim. No formatting, suffix, or abbreviation is applied.

Fixes #94. Thanks to @hanaTsuk1 for the PR.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Fix styling of vault count on mobile.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Fix styling on vault count, which sometimes showed up on the same line as header buttons.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Update the plugin for the latest version of Obsidian, which moves the vault name to a dedicated footer. The vault count is now shown on the File Explorer pane underneath the header buttons.

Fixes #87.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Add a setting to exclude footnotes from word, character, and page counts. Thanks to @PaulieGlover for the PR.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Fix handling of empty links, e.g. `[my link]()` or `[[]]`. Previously, an empty link on the same line as a non-empty link could cause an incorrect word count. Now all links should be handled correctly. Fixes #82.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Update the "Include file/folder names" setting to allow file and folder _exclusions_ by using the `!` prefix on any term. Fixes #81.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Parse and count text nodes in Obsidian Canvas. Fixes #80.
- Add a donation button to the Settings page. If you want to support continued maintenance and development of this plugin, leave me a tip [on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/isaaclyman).

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Add an option to exclude non-visible portions of links from all counts. Fixes #78.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Rewrite the word/character counter to accurately count notes in any language, including mixed-language notes. Existing word counts may be slightly altered. Fixes #71.
- Removed the "Word Count Method" setting, since it's no longer needed.
- Benchmark the Obsidian word counter, the old word counter, and the new word counter to make sure performance is sufficient on large notes and vaults.

Related: #79.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Turn off SASS sourcemaps to avoid console error on startup. Fixes #77.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Fix bugs in the new "Include file/folder names" setting.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Add an "Include file/folder paths" setting under Advanced Settings. This can be used to _only_ count folders and notes containing specific terms; see the README. Fixes #75.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Use YYYY/MM/DD format for dates, making them unambiguous in every locale. Fixes #70.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Add an option under "Advanced Settings" to ignore code blocks in all counts. Fixes #74, #76.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Improve handling of date and number formatting for the user's locale.

Related to #70, #65.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Implement custom formatting options in the Settings screen. Now you can choose the suffix for most data types as well as the data type separator. To use this feature, enable the "Use advanced formatting" toggle at the top of the Settings.
- Notes and Folders now have their own alignment and abbreviation options.

Fixes #65, #27, #23.

This was a big feature to implement and makes the plugin more difficult to maintain. If you find it useful, please consider [leaving me a tip](https://ko-fi.com/isaaclyman).

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix bug caused by a race condition when counting large notes.

Fixes #66.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix SI abbreviations for File Size count type.

Fixes #63.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add "Reading Time" count type, providing estimated time to read each note. Allow setting 'Words per minute' (default 265) and 'Characters per minute' (default 500) depending on Word Count Type.

Fixes #61.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add an option to exclude whitespace from Character Count.

Fixes #60.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Exclude uncountable files (PNG, JPG, Excalibur, PDF, etc.) from Note Count.

Fixes #58.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fixed a bug causing extremely large, uncountable files to crash the plugin (fixes #55)
- Removed conditional counts (character, word, page, etc.) from being shown on uncountable files (like PDFs and JPGs; fixes #57)

Huge thanks to @RLGingerBiscuit for reporting these issues and providing code to fix them.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Fix code formatting and correct manifest.json (a commit was left behind on the previous release).

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Reduce startup processing time by waiting until workspace is ready before analyzing files and registering the `create` hook.

Also relevant to #51.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Revert previous release, which wouldn't count files on some vaults.
- Performance overhaul: only recount affected file on create/rename/delete, not entire vault.
- Refactor source files for better separation of concerns.

Fixes #51.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Exclude `<!-- HTML comments -->` from counts when the "Exclude comments" setting is toggled on. This improves portability of notes.

Fixes #45.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Add some other common Markdown extensions to the file type allowlist.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add `.fountain` extension to file type allowlist. [Fountain](https://fountain.io/) files will now be counted.

Related: #7.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Use an allowlist instead of a denylist when deciding which files to count. At publish time, this includes MD, TXT, RTF, QMD, and RMD. Adding new file types is easy; please [file an issue](https://github.com/isaaclyman/novel-word-count-obsidian/issues/new?assignees=isaaclyman&labels=&projects=&template=bug_report.md&title=) if something is missing.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
~- Attempt to count all files in the vault, not just what Obsidian recognizes as a Markdown file. QMD, RMD, and TXT files are now included in counts. If any files are being counted that shouldn't be, please [file an issue](https://github.com/isaaclyman/novel-word-count-obsidian/issues/new?assignees=isaaclyman&labels=&projects=&template=bug_report.md&title=).~
- EDIT: In the latest update, an allowlist is used instead of a denylist. If any files are _not_ being counted that _should_ be, please file an issue.

Fixes #7.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Hide link count / embed count when the total is 0.
- Clarify the description for link count: only counts links to other notes in the same vault. (This isn't up to me, it's Obsidian's built-in behavior.)
- Improve Inline styling when folder names are very short.
- Fix a bug causing link and embed counts not to propagate to parent folders.

Fixes #49.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Fix number localization on unabbreviated counts.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix display styles when counts are very long, e.g. a very long note alias.

Fixes #48.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Add the "% of Word Goal" data type. To use it, add the `word-goal` property to any note.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Ensure plugin's `data.json` file is kept up to date as individual files change.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add a setting to allow excluding comments from character, word, and page counts.

Fixes #45.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - As an alternative to the `exclude-from-word-count` tag, allow using the `wordcount: false` property to exclude a note from counts. See https://github.com/isaaclyman/novel-word-count-obsidian#excluding-notes.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Look for the `exclude-from-word-count` tag in frontmatter; if present, exclude the note from all counts except note count, created date, last updated date, and file size.

Fixes #46.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Exclude PDFs and images from word and page count. In rare cases these would be included, but the count would be wrong.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix for frontmatter being included in word and page count on Obsidian 1.4 (Insiders build).

Fixes #44.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix a bug caused by a breaking change in Obsidian 1.4 (Insiders build). Counts may unavoidably include frontmatter until the API is fixed.

Fixes #43.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Don't include frontmatter in word count, character count, or page count.

Fixes #41.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add "First Alias" as a data type.

Fixes #40.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Add a toggle to allow including whitespace characters in the page count when "Page count method" is set to "Characters per page." Fixes #39.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Added two new count types: Link Count and Embed Count. Link Count counts the number of outbound links in a note, while Embed Count counts the number of attached files (like images and embedded notes).

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Automatically exclude Excalidraw files from word, page, and character counts. Excalidraw files are detected by the presence of the "excalidraw" tag in frontmatter. These files are still included in Note Count and File Size.

Fixes #8, #12, #20, #37.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Added a "File Size" data type that counts the disk size of each note's contents (e.g. "13.2 KB").

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix compatibility with Obsidian Insiders build. Tested with both the latest stable build (1.1.16) and latest Insiders (1.2.0).

Fixes #33.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Added a new **Folders** section to the Settings. If you prefer to see different statistics on notes and folders, turn off the "Show same data on folders" toggle and you'll be able to select different count types for folders. If you prefer not to see _any_ statistics on either notes or folders, set all the corresponding data types to "None".

Fixes #30, #21.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Adds support for a new word count method that counts Han, Hiragana, Katakana, and Hangul characters for compatibility with Chinese, Japanese, and Korean. See the plugin settings. Fixes #19.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add "Note count (folders only)" to count options.

Fixes #14, #16, #28, #29.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add **Page Count (decimal)** to count options for people who want a more exact page count

Fixes #25.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Bugfix: recompile CSS

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Remove left padding and margin on "below" display option
- Align word count to file/folder text baseline

Fixes #24.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - On layout change, check the file explorer leaf to see if displayed counts actually needs to be re-added. This ensures we update on workspace change, but not when you simply open or close a file. Fixes #18.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix logic for determining aggregate page counts. A note that says "1 page" may in fact be only a fractional page, so folder counts now sum up page counts _before_ rounding instead of after. (All page counts are still rounded up.)
- Add a setting to determine whether to count pages by number of words or number of characters. Fixes #17.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Added Note Count as a display option
- Allow users to create their own side-by-side counts instead of using a predetermined list
- Please note: if you were using one of the side-by-side counts in a previous version (`Pages | Words`, `Pages | Words | Characters`, or `Created | Modified`), the plugin will revert to Word Count. Please visit the plugin settings to set your side-by-side counts how you like them.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add new data display types:
  - Pages | Words
  - Pages | Words | Characters
  - Created | Updated
- Add hotkey bindings for each display option
- Add hotkey binding to toggle abbreviation
- Refactor to make new data display types easier to add in the future

Fixes #11.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add "Words per page" field to plugin settings. Validate result, fall back to 300, and reanalyze vault (debounced) when this is changed.
- Fixes issue 10.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Hook into the `layout-change` event to re-render word counts when switching workspaces (core plugin compatibility). Fixes #9.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Use SCSS to simplify styling
- Add options for aligning data relative to file/folder names: inline, right-aligned, or below

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add debug mode to track and time expensive operations
- Fix bug causing vault-level recalculation on each change
- Debounce rename hook so that moving a folder to another folder doesn't trigger multiple recalculations
- Recalculate vault when a file is created or deleted
- Only set display counts for a file that has changed and its parents

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Update README and manifest.json to indicate new features

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: Add Character Count as an option. Uses `String.prototype.length`.

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add a setting toggle that abbreviates file descriptions to save space.
  - `2,345 words` > `2,345w`
  - `24 pages` > `24p`
  - `Created 3/15/2022` > `3/15/2022/c`
  - `Updated 3/15/2022` > `3/15/2022/u`
- Say `1 page` instead of `1 pages` (fixes #1)

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Add Created Date and Last Updated Date as data display options
- Added a command to cycle through data display options, in case users want to hotkey it

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description:
- Fix bug on startup that caused counts to not appear
- Add a command and a button in the plugin settings to manually recount all files in vault

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: - Use instanceof instead of duck typing for TAbstractFile

releases.author: isaaclyman
releases.description: Initial release
